g.title: proposed
g.text: Single repo, parameterized engine, config/data separation

g.title: cluster_config
g.text: (one folder per revision -- generated by parser, human-readable)

g.title: cluster_builder
g.text: (assembles a policy state for each date in the timeline)

g.title: cluster_data
g.text: (loaded once, not config -- describes the world, not policy)

g.title: cluster_engine
g.text: (pure functions, parameterized by YAML, no hardcoded authority names)

g.title: engine
g.text: 1. Auto rebate 2. USMCA exemptions 3. MFN exemptions

g.title: repeat
g.text: repeat for each date in timeline

g.title: legend
g.text: PREPROCESSING (HTS parsing, cached, run once per revision)
CONFIG (per-revision policy: rates, params, stacking rules)
SCENARIO BUILDER + ENGINE (assemble config, compute rates)
DATA (external, loaded once: imports, metal, USMCA, MFN)
for 40-date scenario (39 cache reads + 1 engine run)
